final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a road-trip scene (all in-image text in English).

Style/medium: needs a "复古美式风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1950s American Route 66 postcard illustration, 1970s California surf culture poster art, Edward Hopper's open-road loneliness; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a red convertible car as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include Route 66 highway, desert landscape with cacti on both sides, sunset sky dyed orange-red
Lighting/mood: needs a sunset open-road atmosphere with a free-spirited mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an orange-red dominant direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in English by default
Avoid:
